name: highlighters-consumer-smoke
description: Installs highlighters tarballs and runs ESM/CJS/subpath/SSR import smokes. @highlighters/* deps are added at install time by scripts/consumer-smoke.sh against the just-packed tarballs — do not pin them here, version drift will break the script.

scripts.smoke: node esm-smoke.mjs && node cjs-smoke.cjs && node subpath-smoke.mjs && node ssr-smoke.mjs
